title: Toward Water Seven
description: The crew learns about the sea train and Water Seven, setting their next goal around repairing or replacing the damaged Going Merry.
scene: Across pages 14, 15, 16, 17, this part follows Luffy, Nami, Zoro, Sanji, Usopp. The crew learns about the sea train and Water Seven, setting their next goal around repairing or replacing the damaged Going Merry.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: I'm chimnie!! This is gone, the cat.

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: I thought you were train robbers. Kakakaka!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Sometimes it transports mails and packages, too.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Wow! There really is a railroad!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: That's some very cool fighting spirit!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: So... where do you want to go?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: If you take the next train...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: We have to follow the guide post.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Oh? Where is your guide post pointing?

summary: The crew learns about the sea train and Water Seven, setting their next goal around repairing or replacing the damaged Going Merry.
